prompt: I have a PRD for admin audit log exports: admins can filter by actor, date range, and event type, export CSV for compliance, and see export failures. Please break this into grabbable GitHub issues.
assertions: Creates or plans a new parent tracker issue because the source was not a GitHub issue.
The parent tracker issue body includes a task graph plus explicit how-to-grab-work guidance.
Child issues are vertical feature slices rather than horizontal database/API/UI tasks.
Each child issue includes queue position information such as execution wave and readiness guidance.
Final summary lists parent and child issue numbers with dependency or wave information.
